title: cleistes latiplume
intro: Cleistes latiplume, also known as the feather plume twayblade, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. It is a terrestrial orchid that belongs to the genus Cleistes, which is characterized by its unique, flat leaves. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever and respiratory problems. Cleistes latiplume is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves are also used in herbal remedies to promote respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
